import type { HandleNodeAccumulator, RouteNode } from '../types' import type { Generator } from '../generator' export interface GeneratorPlugin { name: string init?: (opts: { generator: Generator }) => void onRouteTreeChanged?: (opts: { routeTree: Array<RouteNode> routeNodes: Array<RouteNode> rootRouteNode: RouteNode acc: HandleNodeAccumulator }) => void afterTransform?: (opts: { node: RouteNode prevNode: RouteNode | undefined }) => void }
